# Sequences and Recurrence {#sec-10-sequences-rnn}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*Order matters. Parameter sharing across time gives the RNN; products of Jacobians give vanishing gradients; gates (LSTM/GRU) give memory a highway.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `sources/7.1-RNN-v3.tex`
transcripts:
- `m07_lecture-7-recurrent-neural-networks_qyU35PKg_NE.txt`
- `m07_lecture-7-2-recurrent-neural-networks-part-2__2NGDmVNUrM.txt`
- `[coding]_m07_lecture-7-3-recurrent-neural-networks-part-3_Az0K6fyf-X4.txt`
-->
